No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health, well-being, or disease prevention.

Quality Education.reason: As a Master's level university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also explicitly develops relevant skills like mathematical modeling and scientific computing for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 強化建立數學模型，解決問題之能力
強化數理資訊與科學計算之能力

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops skills in mathematical modeling, problem-solving, and scientific computing, foundational for technological upgrading and innovation, contributing to higher economic productivity (Target 8.2).
evidence: 強化建立數學模型，解決問題之能力
了解理論如何可用於實際問題

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Optimization theory and scientific computing are fundamental for industrial innovation, enhancing technological capabilities (Target 9.5), and improving resource-use efficiency in industries (Target 9.4) by solving practical problems.
evidence: 強化數理資訊與科學計算之能力
了解理論如何可用於實際問題

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to reducing income or other forms of inequality.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to urban development, housing, or sustainable transport.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Optimization theory, applied to practical problems, directly contributes to the sustainable management and efficient use of natural resources (Target 12.2) and can help reduce waste in production.
evidence: 了解理論如何可用於實際問題

Climate Action.reason: While optimization can be applied to climate-related issues, the syllabus lacks explicit evidence linking the course content to climate action targets.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or deforestation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to peace, justice, or institutional development.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: While group projects involve collaboration, this is too indirect to align with the broad scope of global partnerships and resource mobilization defined by this SDG.
